design_philosophy: A tactical, command-center dashboard for aggressive e-commerce scaling to 1000€/day. High-contrast, elite focus, heavy-weight athletic typography for numbers, sharp edges.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Density, Data Correlation, Scanability)
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px for tactical feel)
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned data, centered values in metric cards. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Summary: col-span-1. Primary Data: col-span-2 row-span-2. Feed/List: col-span-1 row-span-2.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (#111111), 1px solid border (border-[#27272A]), 2px Inner Glow highlights (box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05)). NO soft shadows.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.interactive_elements: The 'Tracing Beam' or tactical neon 1px strokes. High-saturation accent blocks for progress bars.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.hover_states: Hover: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white. Sharp, instantaneous changes, no mushy transitions.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.glassmorphism: Not used for primary panels; only for sticky header if overlapping. Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 with border-b border-[#27272A].

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI heavily customized for tactical dark mode.
components.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Solid brand color or outline with 1px border. font-bold, tracking-wide uppercase.
components.charts: Recharts via Shadcn with neon accent strokes on dark backgrounds. No grid lines, or extremely subtle grid lines (opacity 5%).
components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-[#27272A] text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF]. Square corners.
components.tables: Dense, crisp borders, distinct hover rows. text-sm.
components.tabs: Underline or solid block active state, high contrast.

icons.style: Bold or Duotone, geometric, high clarity

image_urls.description: Abstract neon dark grid for the main overview hero section

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Barlow Condensed font for headings (via Google Fonts) and Inter for body.
Create a strict dashboard layout (The 'Control Room' Grid) for the main overview (1000€/day goal, metrics).
Use the product images in the 'Winning Products' catalogue section.
Ensure all interactive elements have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
